docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,219.75 FILED BY HMSB ASSOCIATES DBA FIRST COMPUTER SALES &SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT XAOS TOOLS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
